basic_details.job_title: Mizoram PSC Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 51 Assistant, SAS and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Assistant Grade, Senior Horticulture Demonstrator, SAS-I
basic_details.total_vacancies: Assistant Grade: 41 Posts | Senior Horticulture Demonstrator: 5 Posts | SAS-I: 5 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Mizoram Public Service Commission (MPSC) has released two important recruitment notifications on 5th May 2026. The first is Limited Departmental Examination (LDE) for the post of Assistant Grade (Advt. No. 16 of 2026-27) and the second is Direct Recruitment for Senior Horticulture Demonstrator and Subordinate Agriculture Service-I (SAS-I) (Advt. No. 7 of 2026-27). Eligible candidates can submit online applications through the MPSC portal https://mpsconline.mizoram.gov.in till 12th June 2026 (4:00 PM). These recruitments offer excellent career opportunities in Group ‘B’ (Non-Gazetted) posts wit

application_fee.details: If payment is to be done through UPI, it may be done using only the mobile number used for one time registration. Persons with disabilities are exempted from payment of application fees. Fees once paid is non-refundable under any circumstances.

qualification.details: For Assistant Grade (LDE): | Officers holding UDC posts with 5 years regular service in the grade (3 years for those already in service as per earlier rules). Must fulfill conditions as per relevant Recruitment Rules. | For Senior Horticulture Demonstrator: | B.Sc. (Horticulture) from a recognized University. | For Subordinate Agriculture Service-I (SAS-I): | Bachelor’s Degree in Agriculture from a recognized University. | Common Requirements (Direct Recruitment): | Computer Proficiency: As prescribed by Mizoram Group ‘A’, ‘B’ & ‘C’ posts Service Rules 2023. Mizo Language Proficiency: Pass in qualifying test (exemption for those who studied Mizo up to Class-X or MIL). Age Limit: 18 to 35 years as on 01.01.2026 (relaxation of 5 years for SC/ST candidates).

how_to_apply: One-Time Registration: New users must complete One-Time Registration on the MPSC portal before filling the application.
Fill Online Application: Login and fill all personal, educational, and service details accurately.
Upload Required Documents: Upload scanned copies of educational certificates, experience certificates, Computer Proficiency Certificate, Mizo Language Certificate, etc.
Pay Application Fee: Pay the fee online (UPI using registered mobile number).
Submit & Verify: Submit the form and verify that the application status shows successful submission after payment.
Keep Printout: Take a printout of the submitted application for future reference.
important_instructions: Applications must be submitted only through the official MPSC online portal. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. Any false information or suppression of facts will result in cancellation of candidature. Government servants must apply through proper channel wherever applicable. Helpline: 0389-3596493 (10:00 AM to 4:00 PM on working days). All updates will be available only on the official MPSC website.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Mizoram PSC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for Mizoram PSC Recruitment 2026 is 12 June 2026 up to 4:00 PM. Candidates must complete the application process through the official MPSC portal before the deadline. Late submissions will not be accepted under any circumstances.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in MPSC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 51 vacancies have been announced under this recruitment drive. It includes 41 posts for Assistant Grade through LDE and 10 posts under direct recruitment for Senior Horticulture Demonstrator and SAS-I.

faq.question: Q3. What are the posts offered in Mizoram PSC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The recruitment includes posts such as Assistant Grade, Senior Horticulture Demonstrator, and Subordinate Agriculture Service-I (SAS-I). These positions fall under Group ‘B’ (Non-Gazetted) category in various government departments.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for MPSC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The qualification depends on the post applied for. Candidates must have B.Sc. (Horticulture) for Horticulture Demonstrator, a Bachelor’s Degree in Agriculture for SAS-I, and relevant service experience for Assistant Grade (LDE).

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for Mizoram PSC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: For direct recruitment posts, candidates must be between 18 to 35 years as on 01 January 2026. Age relaxation of 5 years is applicable for SC/ST candidates as per government norms.

faq.question: Q6. Is computer knowledge required for MPSC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Yes, computer proficiency is mandatory as per Mizoram Government service rules. Candidates must possess the required certification or knowledge as prescribed for Group A, B, and C posts.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for Mizoram PSC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process varies depending on the post. It may include written examination, limited departmental examination, and/or interview as per the recruitment rules.

faq.question: Q8. How can I apply online for Mizoram PSC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must first complete One-Time Registration on the MPSC portal. After registration, they can fill out the application form, upload documents, pay the fee, and submit the application online.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee exemption for MPSC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Yes, persons with disabilities (PwD) are exempted from paying the application fee. Other candidates must pay the prescribed fee through online mode using UPI.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for Mizoram PSC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for Mizoram PSC Recruitment 2026 is 12 June 2026 up to 4:00 PM. Candidates must complete the application process through the official MPSC portal before the deadline. Late submissions will not be accepted under any circumstances.
